race.comment: Tricky race with a few likely chances on debut. NAVAL COMMAND (4) is a nicely bred colt by top sire Home Affairs out of Sea Siren who was a multiple G1 winner. He kicks off under the care of Mark Walker and has jumped out well enough to be going close here. ACHY BREAKY HEART (1) is a gelding by Nicconi on debut for the Payne yard who won his latest trial at Caulfield Heath. He can put his best foot forward. PIAZZA (13) is a well-bred gelding by So You Think out of Missy Cummings, making him related to G1 winner Mizzy and good mare She's Got Pizzazz. He's jumped out well for the Price & Kent Jnr yard, respecting. TAGLOW (12) is a filly by Tagaloa for the Busuttin & Young stable who has also jumped out nicely, watch the betting.
